case_title: CATHERINE VELOSA VS. PAN'S HOUSE OF HORNS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELOSA, CATHERINE AS TO DEFENDANT PAN'S HOUSE OF HORNS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VELOSA, CATHERINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAN'S HOUSE OF HORNS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $9,161.13 PRINCIPAL, $45.85 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,360.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
